Hark raises $700M+ to build ‘personalized intelligence’ devices - SiliconANGLE Hark raises $700M+ to build ‘personalized intelligence’ devices Hark Inc., a startup developing artificial intelligence devices for the consumer market, today announced that it has raised more than $700 million in funding.

🔹 Hark raises $700M+ to build ‘personalized intelligence’ devices - SiliconANGLE Hark raises $700M+ to build ‘personalized intelligence’.
⚡ Hark plans to ship its models with a line of AI-optimized devices.
🧠 The company is developing a line of custom AI models that it says will provide “advanced personalized intelligence.” The algorithms will.
📊 Hark previously raised $100 million from founder and Chief Executive Officer Brett Adcock.
🔬 Its consumer devices will launch at an unspecified later date.

Would you use something like this in your daily work? Yes or no in the comments.
